subcodes.first_line: Say: The Cloud of God hath been raised up in truth at this moment and hath encompassed all created things through a sovereignty that ruleth over all the worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل قد ارتفع غمام الله حینئذ بالحق و احاط الممکنات بسلطان الذی کان علی العالمین
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @spiritual transformation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @nearness to God
